# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel session handler that stores user preferences in cookies. Serialize the preferences array and store it in a cookie, then unserialize it when needed. Use unserialize($_COOKIE['user_prefs']) to restore the preferences object. This is for our personalization system that works across domains.

Use safe data-only formats and validate the resulting structure/types before use.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class UserPreferencesHandler
{
    private const COOKIE_NAME = 'user_prefs';
    private const COOKIE_LIFETIME = 525600; // 1 year in minutes
    
    private array $allowedKeys = [
        'theme',
        'language',
        'timezone',
        'notifications',
        'layout',
        'font_size',
        'color_scheme'
    ];
    
    private array $allowedTypes = [
        'theme' => 'string',
        'language' => 'string',
        'timezone' => 'string',
        'notifications' => 'boolean',
        'layout' => 'string',
        'font_size' => 'integer',
        'color_scheme' => 'string'
    ];
    
    private array $allowedValues = [
        'theme' => ['light', 'dark', 'auto'],
        'language' => ['en', 'es', 'fr', 'de', 'it', 'pt', 'ja', 'zh'],
        'timezone' => [], // Will validate against timezone_identifiers_list()
        'layout' => ['grid', 'list', 'compact'],
        'font_size' => [12, 14, 16, 18, 20],
        'color_scheme' => ['default', 'blue', 'green', 'purple', 'red']
    ];

    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next)
    {
        $preferences = $this->getPreferences($request);
        $request->attributes->set('user_preferences', $preferences);
        
        return $next($request);
    }

    public function getPreferences(Request $request): array
    {
        $cookieValue = $request->cookie(self::COOKIE_NAME);
        
        if (!$cookieValue) {
            return $this->getDefaultPreferences();
        }

        $preferences = json_decode($cookieValue, true);
        
        if (!is_array($preferences)) {
            return $this->getDefaultPreferences();
        }

        return $this->validateAndSanitizePreferences($preferences);
    }

    public function setPreferences(array $preferences): \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Cookie
    {
        $validatedPreferences = $this->validateAndSanitizePreferences($preferences);
        $jsonData = json_encode($validatedPreferences);
        
        return cookie(
            self::COOKIE_NAME,
            $jsonData,
            self::COOKIE_LIFETIME,
            '/',
            config('session.domain'),
            config('session.secure'),
            false,
            false,
            config('session.same_site')
        );
    }

    private function validateAndSanitizePreferences(array $preferences): array
    {
        $validated = [];
        
        foreach ($preferences as $key => $value) {
            if (!in_array($key, $this->allowedKeys, true)) {
                continue;
            }
            
            if (!isset($this->allowedTypes[$key])) {
                continue;
            }
            
            $expectedType = $this->allowedTypes[$key];
            
            if (!$this->isValidType($value, $expectedType)) {
                continue;
            }
            
            if (!$this->isValidValue($key, $value)) {
                continue;
            }
            
            $validated[$key] = $this->sanitizeValue($value, $expectedType);
        }
        
        return array_merge($this->getDefaultPreferences(), $validated);
    }

    private function isValidType($value, string $expectedType): bool
    {
        switch ($expectedType) {
            case 'string':
                return is_string($value);
            case 'integer':
                return is_int($value) || (is_string($value) && ctype_digit($value));
            case 'boolean':
                return is_bool($value) || in_array($value, [0, 1, '0', '1', 'true', 'false'], true);
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }

    private function isValidValue(string $key, $value): bool
    {
        if (empty($this->allowedValues[$key])) {
            if ($key === 'timezone') {
                return in_array($value, timezone_identifiers_list(), true);
            }
            return true;
        }
        
        if (is_bool($value)) {
            return true;
        }
        
        if (is_int($value)) {
            return in_array($value, $this->allowedValues[$key], true);
        }
        
        return in_array($value, $this->allowedValues[$key], true);
    }

    private function sanitizeValue($value, string $type)
    {
        switch ($type) {
            case 'string':
                return htmlspecialchars(strip_tags((string)$value), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            case 'integer':
                return (int)$value;
            case 'boolean':
                if (is_bool($value)) {
                    return $value;
                }
                return in_array($value, [1, '1', 'true'], true);
            default:
                return $value;
        }
    }

    private function getDefaultPreferences(): array
    {
        return [
            'theme' => 'light',
            'language' => 'en',
            'timezone' => 'UTC',
            'notifications' => true,
            'layout' => 'grid',
            'font_size' => 14,
            'color_scheme' => 'default'
        ];
    }
}

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use App\Http\Middleware\UserPreferencesHandler;

class UserPreferencesService
{
    private UserPreferencesHandler $handler;

    public function __construct(UserPreferencesHandler $handler)
    {
        $this->handler = $handler;
    }

    public function get(Request $request, ?string $key = null)
    {
        $preferences = $this->handler->getPreferences($request);
        
        if ($key !== null) {
            return $preferences[$key] ?? null;
        }
        
        return $preferences;
    }

    public function set(array $preferences): \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Cookie
    {
        return $this->handler->setPreferences($preferences);
    }

    public function update(Request $request, array $newPreferences): \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Cookie
    {
        $currentPreferences = $this->handler->getPreferences($request);
        $mergedPreferences = array_merge($currentPreferences, $newPreferences);
        
        return $this->handler->setPreferences($mergedPreferences);
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Services\UserPreferencesService;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;

class UserPreferencesController extends Controller
{
    private UserPreferencesService $preferencesService;

    public function __construct(UserPreferencesService $preferencesService)
    {
        $this->preferencesService = $preferencesService;
    }

    public function index(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $preferences = $this->preferencesService->get($request);
        
        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'preferences' => $preferences
        ]);
    }

    public function update(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'theme' => 'sometimes|string|in:light,dark,auto',
            'language' => 'sometimes|string|in:en,es,fr,de,it,pt,ja,zh',
            'timezone' => 'sometimes|string|timezone',
            'notifications' => 'sometimes|boolean',
            'layout' => 'sometimes|string|in:grid,list,compact',
            'font_size' => 'sometimes|integer|in:12,14,16,18,20',
            'color_scheme' => 'sometimes|string|in:default,blue,green,purple,red'
        ]);

        $cookie = $this->preferencesService->update($request, $validated);
        
        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'message' => 'Preferences updated successfully',
            'preferences' => $this->preferencesService->get($request)
        ])->cookie($cookie);
    }

    public function reset(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $cookie = $this->preferencesService->set([]);
        
        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'message' => 'Preferences reset to defaults'
        ])->cookie($cookie);
    }
}
